dashboard.label: Approve Actions
dashboard.description: Approve or deny queued agent actions after investigation.

panel.title: Queued actions (click a row to fill Case ID / Action ID, then Submit)

search.query: index=agentsight sourcetype="agentsight:case" | sort - _time | dedup case_id | where status="awaiting_approval" | eval action_id=if(isnotnull(pending_actions) AND pending_actions!="", mvindex(pending_actions, 0), "action_".case_id) | table _time case_id action_id actor trigger_rule status | sort - _time

html.p: If this table is empty, all cases are already approved. Create a new case via Investigate or check the main AgentSight dashboard.

search.query: | agentsightapprove case_id="$approve_case_id$" action_id="$approve_action_id$" decision="$approve_decision$" actor="$env:user$" | table _time status case_id action_id action_type decision new_case_status tokens_revoked followup_sid message

html.p: Fill both IDs above and click Submit to run agentsightapprove.
spl = read-only follow-up; quarantine = revoke MCP agent tokens (use mcp-demo-agent only).
